logger.doc:name: Log Get Orders
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Fetching SAP orders - offset=" ++ (attributes.queryParams.offset default "0") ++ " limit=" ++ (attributes.queryParams.limit default "20")]

http:request.doc:name: Request SAP Orders

logger.doc:name: Log Orders Retrieved
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Retrieved " ++ sizeOf(payload.orders default []) ++ " SAP orders"]

logger.doc:name: Log SAP Error
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] SAP connectivity error fetching orders: " ++ error.description]

logger.doc:name: Log Create Order
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Creating SAP order for customer: " ++ (payload.customerId default "unknown")]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, sapOrderNumber: vars.sapOrderNumber, orderId: payload.d.SalesOrder default "", orderType: payload.d.SalesOrderType default "OR", salesOrganization: payload.d.SalesOrganization default "", status: "CREATED", createdAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, correlationId: vars.correlationId, message: "SAP Sales Order created successfully" }

logger.doc:name: Log Order Created
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] SAP Order created: " ++ vars.sapOrderNumber]

logger.doc:name: Log Validation Error
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Order validation failed: " ++ error.description]

logger.doc:name: Log SAP Error
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] SAP error creating order: " ++ error.description]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, errorCode: "SAP_CREATE_ERROR", message: "Failed to create order in SAP ERP", detail: error.description, correlationId: vars.correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"} }

logger.doc:name: Log Get Order By ID
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Fetching SAP order: " ++ attributes.uriParams.orderId]

logger.doc:name: Log Order Retrieved
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] SAP order " ++ vars.orderId ++ " retrieved with " ++ sizeOf(payload.lineItems default []) ++ " line items"]

logger.doc:name: Log Not Found
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] SAP order not found: " ++ vars.orderId]

logger.doc:name: Log Update Order
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Updating SAP order: " ++ attributes.uriParams.orderId]

ee:transform.doc:name: Transform Update Payload to SAP Format

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var statusMapping = { "APPROVED": "B", "IN_PROGRESS": "C", "COMPLETED": "D", "CANCELLED": "E", "ON_HOLD": "A" } --- { OverallSDProcessStatus: statusMapping[vars.updatePayload.status] default "A", PurchaseOrderByCustomer: vars.updatePayload.purchaseOrderNumber default "", RequestedDeliveryDate: vars.updatePayload.requestedDeliveryDate default "" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, orderId: vars.orderId, status: vars.updatePayload.status default "UPDATED", message: "SAP order updated successfully", updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, correlationId: vars.correlationId }

logger.doc:name: Log Order Updated
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] SAP order " ++ vars.orderId ++ " updated successfully"]

logger.doc:name: Log Get Materials
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Fetching SAP materials - search=" ++ (attributes.queryParams.search default "")]

http:request.doc:name: Get SAP Materials

logger.doc:name: Log Materials Retrieved
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Retrieved " ++ sizeOf(payload.materials default []) ++ " materials"]

logger.doc:name: Log Check Availability
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Checking availability for material: " ++ attributes.uriParams.materialId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var stockData = payload.d.results default [] --- { materialId: vars.materialId, totalAvailableStock: sum(stockData map ((item) -> item.MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit as Number default 0)), unit: (stockData[0].MaterialBaseUnit) default "EA", availabilityByPlant: stockData map ((item) -> { plant: item.Plant default "", storageLocation: item.StorageLocation default "", availableQuantity: item.MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit as Number default 0, inTransitQuantity: item.MaterialInTransitQuantity as Number default 0, blockedStock: item.BlockedMaterialStock as Number default 0, qualityInspectionStock: item.QualityInspectionStockQuantity as Number default 0 }), isAvailable: sum(stockData map ((item) -> item.MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit as Number default 0)) > 0, lastUpdated: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, correlationId: vars.correlationId }

logger.doc:name: Log Availability Result
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Material " ++ vars.materialId ++ " availability checked across " ++ sizeOf(payload.availabilityByPlant default []) ++ " plants"]

logger.doc:name: Log Get Customers
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Fetching SAP customers"]

http:request.doc:name: Get SAP Customers

logger.doc:name: Log Customers Retrieved
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Retrieved " ++ sizeOf(payload.customers default []) ++ " SAP customers"]

logger.doc:name: Log Create Customer
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Creating SAP customer: " ++ (payload.companyName default "unknown")]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, customerId: payload.d.BusinessPartner default "", customerName: payload.d.BusinessPartnerFullName default "", status: "CREATED", createdAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, correlationId: vars.correlationId, message: "SAP customer master created successfully" }

logger.doc:name: Log Customer Created
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] SAP customer created: " ++ payload.customerId]

logger.doc:name: Log Create Invoice
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] Generating SAP invoice for order: " ++ (payload.orderId default "unknown")]

validation:is-not-null.doc:name: Validate Order ID
validation:is-not-null.message: Order ID is required for invoice generation

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, invoiceNumber: payload.d.BillingDocument default "", orderId: vars.invoicePayload.orderId, invoiceType: payload.d.BillingDocumentType default "F2", totalAmount: payload.d.TotalNetAmount as Number default 0, currency: payload.d.TransactionCurrency default "USD", taxAmount: payload.d.TaxAmount as Number default 0, status: "GENERATED", generatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, correlationId: vars.correlationId, message: "Invoice document generated successfully" }

logger.doc:name: Log Invoice Generated
logger.message: #["[" ++ vars.correlationId ++ "] SAP invoice generated: " ++ payload.invoiceNumber]
